emails.subject: Crude trades
emails.body: Boy, was she quick. We appear to have only one trade to assign, so Credit, I guess you are OK with this, and Bob, you don't show any other crude trades do you? Forwarded by Tana Jones/HOU/ECT on 07/05/2000 06:08 PM "Anita Herrera" <aherrera@statoilenergy.com> 07/05/2000 06:06 PM

emails.body: OK with Credit. Statoil was eager to have us return their collateral! Molly Bob Bowen 07/06/2000 02:10 PM
